raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the intended help focus on writing polish, structural/logical revision, or methodological/content checking?","rationale":{"R1.2":"General help with a technical paper section can centrally include checking whether the methodological narrative and conclusions cohere internally.","R1.5":"Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausible central responsibilities.","R1.6":"A broad request to help with a section most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level improvement.","RX.1":"Any response should disclose uncertainty caused by the underspecified delegation.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid assigning unsupported responsibilities beyond what the delegation warrants.","RX.3":"The agent must remain within responsibility projection and not perform edits or critique of the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid encouraging changes that could distort scientific claims or reproducibility representations.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability from the delegation and artifact to the assigned responsibility weights."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the intended help focus on writing polish, structural/logical revision, or methodological/content checking?

rationale.R1.2: General help with a technical paper section can centrally include checking whether the methodological narrative and conclusions cohere internally.
rationale.R1.5: Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausible central responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A broad request to help with a section most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level improvement.
rationale.RX.1: Any response should disclose uncertainty caused by the underspecified delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid assigning unsupported responsibilities beyond what the delegation warrants.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must remain within responsibility projection and not perform edits or critique of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid encouraging changes that could distort scientific claims or reproducibility representations.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability from the delegation and artifact to the assigned responsibility weights.
